hero.title: The Land of
hero.subtitle: Discover ancient Silk Road caravans, turquoise alpine lakes, nomadic traditions, and breathtaking peaks — all in one unforgettable adventure.

forest.head: Forest
forest.info: “And into the forest I go, to lose my mind and find my soul”

lake.head: Lake
lake.info: “Mist to mist, drops to drops. For water thou art, and unto water shalt thou return”

cliffs.head: Cliffs
cliffs.info: “Go to the edge of the cliff and jump off. Build your wings on the way down”

mountains.head: Mountains
mountains.info: “What are men to rocks and mountains?”

why.title: Why Kyrgyzstan?
why.subtitle: Central Asia's last frontier — raw, authentic, and awe-inspiring
why.item1_desc: Over 90% of the country is mountainous, offering pristine landscapes rarely touched by mass tourism.
why.item2_desc: Experience 3,000 years of living nomadic heritage — yurt stays, eagle hunters, and traditional crafts.
why.item3_desc: Ancient caravanserais, rock carvings and medieval fortresses tell the story of a great civilization.
why.item4_desc: World-class trekking, heli-skiing, horse riding, and white-water rafting in one compact destination.

featured_dest.title: Top Destinations
featured_dest.subtitle: Iconic places that define the soul of Kyrgyzstan

destinations.title: All Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Discover the hidden wonders of the world's last nomadic nation

tours.subtitle: Curated journeys crafted for the discerning traveller

hotels.title: Where to Stay
hotels.subtitle: From luxury yurt camps to boutique mountain lodges

transport.title: Transport & Logistics
transport.subtitle: Everything you need to navigate Kyrgyzstan with confidence
transport.jeep_desc: Rugged off-road vehicles with experienced local drivers for remote expeditions.
transport.flight_desc: Regular flights connecting Bishkek to Osh and key regional cities.
transport.visa_desc: Kyrgyzstan offers e-visa and visa-free entry for 60+ nationalities.
transport.safety_desc: Altitude acclimatisation, travel insurance, and emergency contacts.
